CollectionId.note: When dependent op needs 'CollectionId' param, use for_each=aws.rekognition.list_faces and set CollectionId='{{ item.Confidence }}'

DatasetArn.note: When dependent op needs 'DatasetArn' param, use for_each=aws.rekognition.list_dataset_labels and set DatasetArn='{{ item.LabelName }}'

JobId.note: When dependent op needs 'JobId' param, use for_each=aws.rekognition.list_media_analysis_jobs and set JobId='{{ item.JobStatus }}'

Name.note: When dependent op needs 'Name' param, use for_each=aws.rekognition.list_faces and set Name='{{ item.BoundingBox }}'

ProjectArn.note: When dependent op needs 'ProjectArn' param, use for_each=aws.rekognition.list_media_analysis_jobs and set ProjectArn='{{ item.CreationTimestamp }}'

DescribeCollection.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

DescribeDataset.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.DatasetDescription.*

GetMediaAnalysisJob.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.OperationsConfig.*

GetSegmentDetection.note: Multiple list fields — pick primary or emit one per field

ListCollections.note: Multiple list fields — pick primary or emit one per field
